title: Message Templates

fields.name: reminderTone
fields.note: Selected tone. As-built drift column TextColumn reminderTone = text().withDefault(const Constant('Friendly')). UI reads business?.reminderTone ?? 'Friendly'. Observed enum values: Gentle | Friendly | Firm (templates_screen.dart const _tones, lines 13-26). Product-truth names the third tone 'Final' (task directive); as-built code uses 'Firm'. Reconciliation resolves the label.

fields.name: businessName
fields.note: Used only as message sign-off in the live preview (_previewSuffix, lines 201-209); falls back to literal 'OweMe' when absent. Not edited on this screen.

payload.name: reminderTone
payload.note: Only field written by this screen. Enum-like: Gentle | Friendly | Firm (product-truth: Gentle | Friendly | Final). Defaults to 'Friendly' when unset (templates_screen.dart _save, lines 40-47). saveBusiness upserts the single BusinessProfiles row (app_repository.dart 29-38).

referenceData.name: reminderToneSamples
referenceData.description: const _tones — three tone cards with sample messages (Gentle/Friendly/Firm), referencing mock 'Mama Grace' / '₦85,000'. Displayed as tone-selector cards. As-built these sample strings are CLIENT-SIDE constants, not persisted. Reconciliation decides whether tone sample templates persist server-side as part of BusinessProfile or stay local.

values.sample: Hi Mama Grace, hope you're well. Small reminder about the ₦85,000 whenever you can.
Hi Mama Grace, just a reminder your ₦85,000 is due Friday. Thank you!
Hi Mama Grace, your ₦85,000 is now due. Kindly settle today. Thank you.

referenceData.name: tokenTemplate
referenceData.description: The {name}/{amount}/{due} token template rendered as a rich-text 'Template' card. Hardcoded structure: 'Hi {name}, just a reminder your {amount} is due {due}. Thank you!'. Tokens {name},{amount},{due} are the substitution placeholders. Not persisted as-built (inline Text.rich), only the selected tone is saved.

referenceData.name: livePreview
referenceData.description: Client-computed 'customer receives' preview built at runtime from _previewPrefix (lines 195-199) + '₦85,000' sample amount (line 159) + _previewSuffix (lines 201-209, appends businessName sign-off + '· with pay link'). Pure presentation derived from the selected tone; no data read/write.

authContext.note: Business-configuration surface under Settings (business-configurable reminder tone). Per conventions.md roles model, business config / settings is owner-only; staff cannot touch business profile. No explicit in-screen role gate as-built (client trusts session).

special.note: watchBusiness is a drift Stream (StreamBuilder) — local reactive read, not server realtime.

uiStatesHandled: loaded (BusinessProfile row present — prefills _tone from reminderTone)
empty/null-fallback (snapshot.data null → _tone defaults 'Friendly', preview sign-off falls back to 'OweMe')
tone-selected (setState updates _tone on tone-card tap, live preview + token card recompute)
notes: Screen writes ONLY reminderTone on BusinessProfile; all template/sample/token content is client-side constant as-built. No new endpoints invented — action maps to the same BusinessProfile update seam as business-profile screen (repo.saveBusiness). Discrepancy flagged for reconciliation: as-built tone value 'Firm' vs product-truth 'Final'; and whether tone sample templates + token template persist server-side on BusinessProfile or remain local.
